description_long: This is a large cement mixer truck with a striking black body adorned with vivid orange and yellow flame decals along the hood, doors, and the mixing drum. The vehicle features a robust truck cab at the front, complete with side mirrors and visible windows, and is mounted on six heavy-duty wheels for stability and mobility. The main cylindrical mixing drum is mounted horizontally on the rear chassis, with a wide conical hopper at the back for loading materials and a discharge chute for pouring mixed cement. A metal ladder is attached to the side of the drum, providing access to the upper section. The chassis and support frame are constructed from metallic materials, giving the vehicle a rugged, industrial appearance. The overall design is functional and visually dynamic, suitable for urban construction sites.
description: A black cement mixer truck with flame decals, featuring a large rotating drum, truck cab, and metal support frame. It has six wheels, a rear hopper, and a discharge chute for cement pouring.
description_view_0: Front view showing the truck cab, windshield, and flame decals on the hood, with the drum and hopper visible behind.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the truck, the large black mixing drum with flame decals, the cab, and the metal ladder.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the conical hopper, discharge chute, and the back end of the mixing drum.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the drum, cab, and support frame, with flame decals visible on the drum and hood.
